project_type: Monorepo Next.js 15 + React 19 ecosystem with 17 apps, 90+ packages, services
build_system: pnpm 10 + Turborepo. turbo build/test/lint/typecheck. Per-package tsc builds.
test_framework: vitest 2 with globals, jsdom for components, @testing-library/react for UI. Tests in __tests__/ dirs or *.test.ts(x) files.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm turbo typecheck, 2. pnpm turbo test, 3. pnpm turbo build, 4. pnpm turbo lint
setup_instructions: pnpm install (node_modules already present), then use turbo commands
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Node 22, pnpm 10 available. No docker daemon needed for this task.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode; no stubs or mocks in production code; accessible (aria attributes); responsive 360-1440px; dark mode via CSS vars; spring animations via framer-motion/@quant/brand
key_patterns: Package exports from src/index.ts; tests in __tests__/*.test.ts; UI components use React.FC with interface props; framer-motion for animations; CSS var theming (--quant-border, --quant-surface-hover, --quant-text-secondary); Next.js app router for API routes (route.ts); SSE streaming pattern for AI; command palette at Cmd+K; existing packages: @quant/quant-tools (85 tools, IntentRouter, MultiStepPlanner, ToolExecutor), @quant/search (CrossAppSearchService, UniversalSearchService), @quant/notifications (UniversalNotificationCenter), @quant/cross-app-workflows (WorkflowEngine), @quant/command-palette (CommandRegistry, FuzzyMatcher), @quant/universal-timeline (TimelineAggregator), @quant/onboarding (multi-step flows), @quant/shared-ui (Shell components, CommandMenu, NotificationCenter, DragDropManager, ToastManager, KeyboardShortcutManager)
directory_structure: apps/ (17 Next.js apps), packages/ (90+ shared packages), services/ (backend services), e2e/ (Playwright tests), scripts/ (utility scripts). Each package has package.json, tsconfig.json, src/ with index.ts barrel export.
